violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Reach in prep table cooler has multiple products temping at 43-47 degrees F. Service/maintain unit as needed.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer concentration at 3 tub sink not maintained at proper concentration. See table.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert forks/knives stored in cup on reach in prep table cooler in prep area of kitchen.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Sliding door cooler has items above 41 degrees F. Adjust/service as needed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need detail cleaning. Shelving needs cleaning.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
